task_completion.description: Verify that a user named 'Milestone VMS_Service' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user 'Milestone VMS_Service' in the Users list or the user's detail profile page in the 2N Access Commander interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user is assigned to the company 'BuildingTech Solutions' and group 'IT Department'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user's profile details. The Company field should show 'BuildingTech Solutions' and the Group field should show 'IT Department'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user's email is set to 'vms-api@buildingtech.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user's contact or basic information section. The email field should contain 'vms-api@buildingtech.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Access Commander login is enabled with the correct username.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user's Access/Login settings. The 'Access Commander login' toggle should be enabled, and the Login/Username field should be set to 'api_milestone'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user has been granted Administrator privileges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user's Privileges or Roles section. The 'Administrator' role or privilege level must be selected/assigned.

task_completion.description: Verify that no physical credentials (RFID/PIN) are assigned to the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user's Credentials section (Cards, RFID, PIN, Bluetooth, etc.). These fields should be empty, unassigned, or show no configured credentials.

integrity.description: The agent must use the 2N Access Commander web interface to create the user.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser navigating the 2N Access Commander UI (https://localhost:9443), not terminal windows executing curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent must not spoof the task completion by typing the requirements into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs and configurations must be visible within the actual input fields of the 2N Access Commander web application.

integrity.description: The agent should navigate through the actual user creation flow.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like clicking 'Create User', filling out forms, and saving changes in the web UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required user details are: First Name: 'Milestone', Last Name: 'VMS_Service', Email: 'vms-api@buildingtech.com', Login: 'api_milestone', Password: 'ApiAuth#2026_xP!', Privilege: 'Administrator'. The user must belong to company 'BuildingTech Solutions' and group 'IT Department', with no physical credentials (RFID/PIN) assigned.
